_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct periodic reviews/revisions of course content for accuracy, completeness alignment, and currency (e.g., course content documents, lesson plans, student texts, examinations, schedules of instruction, and course descriptions).
reference_document_element_description: Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, risk ratings, and remediation assignments.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-006 (RC, cosine: 0.440), RC-K-001 (RC, cosine: 0.440).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.468). Shared vocabulary: [conduct, periodic]. DCWF-only terms [accuracy, alignment, completeness, content, course, currency] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessments, assignments, compliance, data, documenting, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.850, R=0.887). R exceeds P by 0.036 — the WIDAI KSA's 13 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 27 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.5%). "Conduct periodic reviews/revisions of course content for accuracy, completeness" and "Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, ri" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.529 > STS 0.468 (gap +0.061). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [conduct, periodic] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.8%. Shared tokens: [conduct, periodic]. DCWF-only: [accuracy, alignment, completeness, content, course, currency]. WIDAI-only: [assessments, assignments, compliance, data, documenting, evidence].
